description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ros2 that runs on push to the ros2 branch and on pull requests to that branch. The workflow should build ROS2 packages for multiple ROS distributions (foxy, humble, iron) on different Ubuntu versions (20.04, 22.04). For each job in the matrix, set up ROS, install dependencies, create a ROS2 workspace, check out the rtabmap repository, and build the package using colcon.
